our bakery collection

Burger & Buns

Choose from a range of different type and sizes; Brioche / Vegan brioche / Potato / Beetroot / Charcoal / Matcha Green T.
Sizes available: 100g (Hamburger bun) / 60g (Kids burger bun) / 40g (Slider) / 25g (Cocktail) / 110g Hot dog roll.
** Call us to discuss products and sizes to suit your needs.

Gluten Friendly

We are gluten friendly which means we delegate a special GF production schedule.
We understand that whilst working in a rich flour environment, cross contamination may occur.
